articles.title: "That changed everything...": Gisele Bündchen breaks silence on the life she shared with Tom Brady after snubbing him on Father's Day
articles.description: Tom Brady and Gisele Bundchen marriage continues to dominate headlines even though it has been close to four years since they divorced one another and moved on in their lives. While Gisele Bundchen recently sparked outrage as she snubbed Tom Brady on Father’s Day, the Brazilian supermodel has now reflected on the life she shared with the NFL legend.

articles.title: How Randi Mahomes raised Patrick Mahomes: The single mother's sacrifices behind the NFL's richest superstar in 2026
articles.description: Patrick Mahomes, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player and one of the most popular quarterbacks in the league, recently signed a whopping $500 million extension with the team ahead of the new season. While he has been a force to be reckoned with on the field, Patrick Mahomes has often spoken about how his mother, Randi Mahomes, instilled confidence in him from a young age and has always been there for him through thick and thin.

articles.title: Weekly Horoscope for ♊ GEMINI (June 27 - July 3, 2026): Powerful Networking Opportunities Could Accelerate Your Growth This Week
articles.description: Gemini Weekly Horoscope (27th June 2026 to 3rd July 2026): Gemini, this week brings mental clarity, exciting opportunities, and a stronger sense of purpose. You may notice that situations which previously felt uncertain now begin moving in a positive direction. Your natural intelligence and communication skills become powerful tools for creating progress. New ideas, meetings, conversations, or unexpected opportunities may play an important role in shaping your next steps. This is a week where being open-minded and adaptable works strongly in your favor. Trust your ability to learn quickly and adjust to changing circumstances. The opportunities that appear now could have long-term benefits. Discover what Sandeep Agarwal of Meditate Wisdom reveals in this weekly horoscope for gemini, offering valuable insights into this gemini weekly horoscope.

articles.title: ICAI to help Tirupati temple enhance accounting system
articles.description: India's wealthiest religious trust, Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams, is partnering with the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) to enhance its donation record-keeping. This move follows scrutiny of religious trusts amid embezzlement allegations at the Ayodhya Ram temple. ICAI is developing a comprehensive accounting framework for TTD, expected within 100 days, which other religious bodies can also adopt.

articles.title: India-UK FTA must drive transformational growth, not just higher trade: Piyush Goyal
articles.description: Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal urged Indian and British businesses to aim for "transformational growth" with the upcoming Free Trade Agreement, effective July 15. He emphasized exploring partnerships to maximize opportunities beyond incremental gains. Goyal also highlighted the Double Contribution Convention, benefiting temporary workers, and criticized global rating agencies for their assessment of India's economic potential.

articles.description: The premiere of Akshay Kumar's 'Welcome to the Jungle' has drawn an overwhelmingly positive response, with viewers lauding its relentless humor and entertaining experience. This star-studded comedy is celebrated for encapsulating the frivolous essence of Bollywood. While a few critics argue it was overly prolonged and missed depth, plenty of moviegoers are eager for its box office triumph, especially those in search of unadulterated amusement.

articles.title: Japan's 10-year bond yield reverses course to fall on portfolio rebalancing need
articles.description: Japanese government bond yields dipped on Friday as investors adjusted portfolios following a significant surge in the nation's stock market. The benchmark 10-year yield saw a notable decrease, even as inflation in Tokyo accelerated, suggesting the central bank might consider further rate hikes. This shift indicates a strategic move by investors to rebalance their holdings at the quarter's end, prioritizing stability after equity market gains.
